activities_projects.title: Calculating Equivalent Resistance in Series
activities_projects.objective: Determine total resistance in a series circuit
steps: Connect resistors in series with battery, ammeter and voltmeter
Measure current and voltage across each resistor
Calculate equivalent resistance using Ohm's law
Compare measured and calculated values
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands series resistance and Ohm's law application

activities_projects.title: Calculating Equivalent Resistance in Parallel
activities_projects.objective: Determine total resistance in a parallel circuit
steps: Connect resistors in parallel with battery, ammeter and voltmeter
Measure current in each branch and voltage across resistors
Calculate equivalent resistance using formulas
Compare calculated and observed total current
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands parallel resistance and current distribution

activities_projects.title: Series-Parallel Combination Circuit Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyze current and voltage in a combination circuit
steps: Construct a circuit combining series and parallel resistors
Measure current through each resistor and voltage across them
Calculate expected currents and voltages
Compare measured and calculated values
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies concepts of combination circuits with measurement and calculation
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct measurement, calculation, and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Investigating Resistance of Different Materials
steps: Connect each wire in circuit one by one
Measure current and voltage across the wire
Calculate resistance using Ohm’s law
Compare resistance of different materials
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands factors affecting resistance in conductors

activities_projects.title: Measuring Power Consumption of a Bulb
activities_projects.objective: Calculate power consumed by a bulb in a circuit
steps: Connect bulb in circuit with ammeter and voltmeter
Measure current through and voltage across the bulb
Calculate power using P = V × I
Compare power in series and parallel setups
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands concept of electrical power and its measurement

activities_projects.title: Investigating Effect of Wire Length on Resistance
activities_projects.objective: Study how wire length affects resistance
materials: Same type of wire in different lengths
steps: Connect wires of different lengths in circuit one by one
Measure current and voltage for each
Calculate resistance using Ohm’s law
Plot graph of resistance vs wire length
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Visual understanding of resistance proportionality to length
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate measurement, calculation and graph (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Exploring Effect of Wire Thickness on Resistance
activities_projects.objective: Study how wire thickness (cross-sectional area) affects resistance
materials: Wires of same material but different thickness
steps: Connect wires of different thicknesses in circuit
Measure current and voltage for each wire
Calculate resistance
Compare resistance values with wire thickness
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands inverse relationship between wire thickness and resistance
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate measurement, calculation and conclusion (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Investigating Short Circuit Impact
activities_projects.objective: Quantitatively observe effect of short circuit on current and battery
steps: Connect circuit normally and measure current
Create a short circuit bypassing bulb
Measure current and observe battery heating
Explain hazards using measured values
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands short circuit quantitatively and its hazards

activities_projects.title: Circuit Troubleshooting Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Identify and correct multiple faults in a complex circuit
steps: Inspect circuit to identify faults (broken wire, loose connection, reversed polarity)
Use measurement tools to confirm faults
Correct the faults and test circuit
Explain why faults affected circuit
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops advanced troubleshooting skills and analytical thinking
activities_projects.evaluation: Successful detection, correction, and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Design and Analyze Your Own Combination Circuit
activities_projects.objective: Apply all concepts to create a complex circuit with calculations
steps: Design a circuit with at least 2 series and 2 parallel branches
Draw diagram with symbols
Predict current, voltage, and resistance in each branch
Construct circuit and measure values
Compare predicted and measured values
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies theory and measurement skills in advanced circuit design
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy in design, prediction, measurement, and explanation (10 marks)
